message:
fix(lib): Panic on data operation failures across stdlib modules

Changed 'catch {}' to 'catch unreachable' for critical data operations:

tracemalloc.zig: Empty traceback frame tracking
site.zig: Standard Python prefix initialization
pstats/stats.zig: Sort key collection (2 locations)
ntpath.zig: Windows path concatenation (2 locations)
bdb/bdb_class.zig: Debugger stack frame tracking (2 locations)
asyncio_impl/runtime/loop.zig: Task completion tracking
collections/counter.zig: Negative count removal
tokenize/tokenizer.zig: Indent stack management (3 locations)
fileinput.zig: Line buffer newline append
email/message.zig: Message iterator stack (2 locations)
modulefinder.zig: Module path tracking (4 locations)
warnings/stack.zig: Call stack frame tracking
warnings/context.zig: Filter save/restore (2 locations)
socketserver/mixins.zig: Child process tracking

All prevent silent data loss on OOM.
